original_abstract: This Feature Article explores diverse classes of lipopeptides and their vital roles across multiple biomedical sectors. We examine their growing significance as potent antimicrobial and antifungal agents, their integration into innovative immunotherapies, and their increasing prevalence in personal care formulations, highlighting the unique structural properties that drive these multifaceted applications.
humanized_abstract: Lipopeptides - the colourful palette of fascinating bio-molecules Lipopeptides constitute a wide-ranging group of fascinating bio-molecules used in numerous fields of biomedicine. The growing interest in these bio-molecules is connected to their usage as antibiotic and antifungal agents, in immunotherapeutic approaches and personal care. These many-fold applications find their justification in the unique structure of lipopeptides.
